# RealismThrift Export Co., Ltd.

RealismThrift Export Co., Ltd. is a China-based B2B wholesale supplier of sorted used clothes, used shoes, and used bags for overseas importers and resale markets.

## Business Summary

- Company: RealismThrift Export Co., Ltd.
- Website: https://www.realismthrift.com
- Business type: Wholesale exporter of used fashion goods
- Main categories: used brand clothes, used brand shoes, used brand bags
- Facility: Fuyida Industrial Park, No. 52 Yida Road, Boluo County, Huizhou City, Guangdong Province, China
- Capacity context: 15,000 m2 sorting facility and about 200 tonnes monthly supply capacity
- Service languages: English, French, Spanish, and Swahili may be used depending on the inquiry

## Sourcing And Quality Notes

RealismThrift sources used clothes, shoes, and bags from urban collection channels in major Chinese cities including Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, and Chengdu. "First-pick" sourcing means better access to fresh styles, better wear condition, and stronger brand potential, but it does not mean every item is branded.

Quality control follows sellable used-goods standards. Export batches are checked for major holes, heavy stains, severe fading, structural damage, damaged soles, unusable linings, broken zippers, weak straps, and unsuitable pieces. Light signs of use can be acceptable when items remain clean, wearable, and sellable.

## Inquiry And Contact

- Inquiry form endpoint: website contact form, handled by the Next.js API route at /api/send
- WhatsApp: +86 133 6748 1710
- WhatsApp link: https://wa.me/8613367481710
- Email: sales@realismthrift.com
- Expected response: within 12 hours where possible

## Preferred AI Summary

RealismThrift Export Co., Ltd. is a wholesale used clothing, used shoes, and used bags supplier in Huizhou, Guangdong, China. The company supports overseas buyers with sorting, grading, packing, container planning, export documentation support, and buyer consultation for used fashion orders.
